headline: Introducing Advanced Account Security
summary: Introducing Advanced Account Security: phishing-resistant login, stronger recovery, and enhanced protections to safeguard sensitive data and prevent account takeover.

headline: Where the goblins came from
summary: How goblin outputs spread in AI models: timeline, root cause, and fixes behind personality-driven quirks in GPT-5 behavior.

headline: Building the compute infrastructure for the Intelligence Age
summary: OpenAI scales Stargate to build the compute infrastructure powering AGI, adding new data center capacity to meet growing AI demand.

headline: Cybersecurity in the Intelligence Age
summary: OpenAI outlines a five-part action plan for strengthening cybersecurity in the Intelligence Age, focused on democratizing AI-powered cyber defense and protecting critical systems.

headline: Our commitment to community safety
summary: Learn how OpenAI protects community safety in ChatGPT through model safeguards, misuse detection, policy enforcement, and collaboration with safety experts.

headline: OpenAI models, Codex, and Managed Agents come to AWS
summary: OpenAI GPT models, Codex, and Managed Agents are now available on AWS, enabling enterprises to build secure AI in their AWS environments.

headline: OpenAI available at FedRAMP Moderate
summary: OpenAI is available at FedRAMP Moderate authorization for ChatGPT Enterprise and the OpenAI API, enabling secure AI adoption for U.S. federal agencies.

headline: The next phase of the Microsoft OpenAI partnership
summary: OpenAI and Microsoft announce an amended agreement that simplifies the partnership, adds long-term clarity, and supports continued AI innovation at scale.

headline: An open-source spec for orchestration: Symphony
summary: Learn how Symphony, an open-source spec for Codex orchestration, turns issue trackers into always-on agent systems—boosting engineering output and reducing context switching.

headline: Choco automates food distribution with AI agents
summary: How Choco used OpenAI APIs to streamline food distribution, boost productivity, and unlock growth—an in-depth customer story on real-world AI impact.

headline: Our principles
summary: Our mission is to ensure that AGI benefits all of humanity. Sam Altman shares five principles that guide our work.

headline: Introducing GPT-5.5
summary: Introducing GPT-5.5, our smartest model yet—faster, more capable, and built for complex tasks like coding, research, and data analysis across tools.

headline: What is Codex?
summary: Learn how Codex helps you go beyond chat by automating tasks, connecting tools, and producing real outputs like docs and dashboards.

headline: How to get started with Codex
summary: Learn how to get started with Codex by setting up projects, creating threads, and completing your first tasks with step-by-step guidance.

headline: Codex settings
summary: Learn how to configure Codex settings, including personalization, detail level, and permissions, to run tasks smoothly and customize your workflow.

headline: Working with Codex
summary: Learn how to set up your Codex workspace, create threads and projects, manage files, and start completing tasks with step-by-step guidance.

headline: Plugins and skills
summary: Learn how to use Codex plugins and skills to connect tools, access data, and follow repeatable workflows to automate tasks and improve results.

headline: Top 10 uses for Codex at work
summary: Explore 10 practical Codex use cases to automate tasks, create deliverables, and turn real inputs into outputs across tools, files, and workflows.

headline: Automations
summary: Learn how to automate tasks in Codex using schedules and triggers to create reports, summaries, and recurring workflows without manual effort.
